svg.aria-label: Cloud Security Trends January 2026 Kubernetes 82 Production VS Code CNCF
svg.title: Cloud Security Jan 2026: K8s 82% Production, VS Code Threats, CNCF

g.text: Platform engineering up 67% - GitOps becomes default
Dev-tool tunnel exploited as C2 channel - APT campaigns
GitHub Codespaces - remote SSH bypassing perimeter
Egress monitoring - DLP rules for dev tooling needed
Endpoint hardening - principle of least privilege dev
CRI-O completes external security audit - 0 critical
Net-NTLMv1 rainbow tables released - legacy auth risk
GPU scheduler - Multi-Instance GPU support stable
Disable Net-NTLMv1 - enforce Kerberos AES only
